column1: Maxim and Dimitri Popov (2 headed character)
Bianca (goat that became a Hellspawn Familiar)

Items are a huge part of the books. We need to give items a bigger role in this game. Most items need visuals, but we can wait to use tokens to generate the visuals until we're pretty set with the game

We need to add a diety area on the battlefield. Dieities summoned will temporarily show there and create a new random effect each turn until they leave. Only 1 diety at a time - so itŐs a single square
Buffs and debuffs need to be diplayed somewhere
In addition to health, you can have a shield and armor bar - this takes damage before health based on buffs, magic, armor, etc. but breaking through points created by armor will destroy that armor
We need to address crafting. Let's add it as an important item in the backlog. I'm specifically thinking about the Dungeon Anarchist's Cookbook. I'm thinking Carl should start with that item.
